invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3200（基于ATR 15.6368和近期支撑调整，原为3170）或融资费率Z-Score超过80%（显示进一步拥挤），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3200 (adjusted from 3170 based on ATR 15.6368 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 80% (indicating further crowding).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破93000（基于ATR 413.8247和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score转为正值超过50%（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 93000 (based on ATR 413.8247 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score turns positive above 50% (indicating short pressure easing).
